title: Transcription
subtitle: Cardputer mic · on-device
set_key_hint: Shared with AI Chat and stored in localStorage or read from /data/anima/teacher.json.
sum_no_key: Set your Groq API Key in settings (⚙) to use the summary feature.
load_sub: This may take a few seconds while the system prepares the AI.
placeholder: Speak into the Cardputer microphone — the text will appear here.
new_confirm: Start a new transcription? The current one is already saved.
exit_title: Turn the display back on and exit
foot_hint: On startup the Cardputer display turns off; it turns back on when you exit (even if you close the tab).
notice_auth: Device not paired. Open NucleoOS, enter the PIN shown on the Cardputer, then reopen this app.
notice_busy: Microphone busy. The Cardputer mic is in use by {holder}. Stop it and try again.
notice_model: Voice model unavailable. You need internet (first time) or the Vosk models on SD.
notice_exit: Display turned back on. Transcription saved. You can close the window.
